			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_realm_law = feudal_governor_appointment_succession_law } }
				add_realm_law = feudal_governor_appointment_succession_law
			}
		}
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { var:dm_reform_target = flag:feudal_governor_promotion_succession_law }
		story_owner = {
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_realm_law = feudal_governor_promotion_succession_law } }
				add_realm_law = feudal_governor_promotion_succession_law
			}
		}
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { var:dm_reform_target = flag:tribal_authority_0 }
		story_owner = {
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_realm_law = tribal_authority_0 } }
				add_realm_law = tribal_authority_0
			}
		}
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { var:dm_reform_target = flag:tribal_authority_1 }
		story_owner = {
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_realm_law = tribal_authority_1 } }
				add_realm_law = tribal_authority_1
			}
		}
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { var:dm_reform_target = flag:tribal_authority_2 }
		story_owner = {
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_realm_law = tribal_authority_2 } }
				add_realm_law = tribal_authority_2
			}
		}
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { var:dm_reform_target = flag:tribal_authority_3 }
		story_owner = {
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { has_realm_law = tribal_authority_3 } }
				add_realm_law = tribal_authority_3
			}
		}
	}
	else = { debug_log = "DM_REFORM_ERROR: no registered target law" }
}

dm_reform_capture_current_level_effect = {
	# ROOT: reform story
	set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 0 }
	if = {
		limit = { var:dm_reform_target = flag:top_liege_redirected_to_border_wars_law }
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = top_liege_redirected_to_border_wars_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -3 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = top_liege_not_redirected_to_border_wars_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 3 }
		}
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { var:dm_reform_target = flag:top_liege_not_redirected_to_border_wars_law }
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = top_liege_redirected_to_border_wars_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -3 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = top_liege_not_redirected_to_border_wars_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 3 }
		}
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { var:dm_reform_target = flag:candidate_score_merit_law }
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = candidate_score_merit_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -3 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = candidate_score_prestige_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 3 }
		}
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { var:dm_reform_target = flag:candidate_score_prestige_law }
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = candidate_score_merit_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -3 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = candidate_score_prestige_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 3 }
		}
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { var:dm_reform_target = flag:celestial_army_liege_law_0 }
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = celestial_army_liege_law_0 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -3 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = celestial_army_liege_law_1 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = celestial_army_liege_law_2 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = celestial_army_liege_law_3 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 3 }
		}
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { var:dm_reform_target = flag:celestial_army_liege_law_1 }
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = celestial_army_liege_law_0 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -3 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = celestial_army_liege_law_1 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = celestial_army_liege_law_2 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = celestial_army_liege_law_3 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 3 }
		}
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { var:dm_reform_target = flag:celestial_army_liege_law_2 }
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = celestial_army_liege_law_0 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -3 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = celestial_army_liege_law_1 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -1 }
		}
		if = {

			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 3 }
		}
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = { var:dm_reform_target = flag:crown_authority_legacy_head }
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = crown_authority_legacy_head } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -3 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = crown_authority_titular_liege } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -2 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = crown_authority_0 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = crown_authority_1 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = crown_authority_2 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 2 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = crown_authority_3 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 3 }
		}
	}

		limit = { var:dm_reform_target = flag:crown_authority_titular_liege }

			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = dm_government_reform_mandala_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 0 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = dm_government_reform_meritocratic_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = dm_government_reform_japan_administrative_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 3 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = dm_government_reform_japan_feudal_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = dm_government_reform_nomad_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -3 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = dm_government_reform_steppe_admin_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 2 }
		}

			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -1 }
		}

			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = nomadic_authority_3 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 0 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = nomadic_authority_4 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 2 }
		}
		if = {

		}

			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 0 }
		}

		}
		if = {

			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = city_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 0 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = clan_antagonistic_partition_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 0 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = clan_competitive_partition_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 0 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = clan_impassive_partition_succession_law } }

		}
		if = {

			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 0 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = clan_harmonious_partition_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = herder_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 1 }
		}
		if = {

		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = japanese_appointment_succession_law } }

			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -1 }
		}
		if = {

			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -2 }
		}

			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = -3 }
		}
		if = {

			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = meritocratic_regency_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 3 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = feudal_governor_appointment_succession_law } }

			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 2 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = mandala_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 2 }
		}
		if = {

			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 1 }
		}
		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = celestial_military_appointment_succession_law } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 1 }
		}
		if = {

		}
		if = {

			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 2 }
		}

			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = japanese_military_appointment_succession_law } }

		}

		if = {
			limit = { story_owner = { has_realm_law = tribal_authority_3 } }
			set_variable = { name = dm_reform_current_level value = 3 }
		}
	}
	set_variable = {
		name = dm_reform_interest_delta
		value = var:dm_reform_target_level
	}
	change_variable = {
		name = dm_reform_interest_delta
		subtract = var:dm_reform_current_level
	}
}
